name: @triple-h/chatbot
description: Reusable voice + text chatbot module for multi-agent platforms (VIP, Meeting, Asset, Smart Helmet, Health). 5 pillars: Talk, Action, Perception, Proactive, Self-Improve. v1.1: streaming SSE + multi-agent routing + protocol adapters. Bilingual EN/KO, fully config-driven, agent-agnostic.
